start_keyframe.description: Ce que voit le personnage au début en marchant
start_keyframe.foreground: Main légèrement floue tenant un coin de l'ordinateur portable
start_keyframe.midground: Façade moderne d'un bâtiment avec des fenêtres réfléchissantes
start_keyframe.background: L'architecture urbaine moderne avec des gratte-ciels au loin
start_keyframe.lighting: Lumière du matin avec des reflets gris #4D4D4D et argentés #B3B3B3 sur les bâtiments

end_keyframe.description: Ce que voit le personnage après s'être déplacé
end_keyframe.change: Le regard se tourne vers une boutique créative avec une vitrine colorée
end_keyframe.midground: Vitrine de la boutique avec des objets d'art exposés
end_keyframe.background: Rue animée avec des passants et des voitures
end_keyframe.lighting: Lumière du matin avec des teintes chaudes #FF6F61 sur la vitrine et des reflets bleutés #0090C4

action: Mouvement de marche/exploration dans la scène

start_keyframe.description: Julien is standing in a modern loft filled with artistic elements, talking on the phone. The room is decorated in #5A5A5A, #C0C0C0, #FF7F71, and #00B3F0.
start_keyframe.location: Modern loft with artistic elements in palette colors
start_keyframe.pose: Standing with phone in right hand, left hand gesturing animatedly
start_keyframe.outfit: Casual modern: grey blazer (#5A5A5A), light grey shirt (#C0C0C0), blue jeans (#00B3F0)
start_keyframe.character_b_position: Silhouette visible through a large window, slightly turned to the left

end_keyframe.description: Julien has moved to a seated position on a stool, looking at a canvas with interest.
end_keyframe.pose: Sitting on a stool, phone in hand, leaning slightly forward
end_keyframe.character_b_position: Silhouette in the same position, slightly more upright

action: Julien moves from standing to sitting, shifting focus to a canvas.

start_keyframe.description: Julien is seated at a desk in a vibrant open workspace, intensely focused on his laptop. His colleagues, including Character B, are around him, but B is seen from behind.
start_keyframe.location: Open workspace with walls painted in shades of #6B4D4D and #D1B3B3, with decor elements in #FF8B7D and #1AB3F0.
start_keyframe.pose: Sitting upright with hands poised on the laptop keyboard.
start_keyframe.outfit: Light blue shirt with dark gray pants, matching the colors from the first scene.
start_keyframe.character_b_position: Standing slightly to the left behind Julien, facing away.

end_keyframe.description: Julien leans slightly forward, hands actively typing on the laptop, still surrounded by colleagues.
end_keyframe.pose: Leaning forward, hands typing on the keyboard.
end_keyframe.character_b_position: Standing slightly to the left behind Julien, facing away.

action: Julien leans forward and begins typing on the laptop.

start_keyframe.description: Julien stands in the bustling city, wearing a grey suit (#5E5E5E) with a light grey shirt (#C2C2C2). His expression is one of calm satisfaction, his gaze directed slightly away to the left. Character B stands to his right, back facing the camera, slightly blurred and in silhouette.
start_keyframe.location: City backdrop with buildings in the palette colors #5E5E5E, #C2C2C2, #FF7B6D, #00B1F0.
start_keyframe.pose: Julien stands with arms relaxed at his sides.
start_keyframe.outfit: Grey suit with a light grey shirt.
start_keyframe.character_b_position: Standing to the right of Julien, back to the camera, slightly blurred.

end_keyframe.description: Julien has turned slightly to face the camera, his expression more pronounced with a satisfied smile. His gaze now meets the camera. Character B remains in the same position, still blurred and in silhouette.
end_keyframe.pose: Julien has shifted his stance to face the camera more directly.
end_keyframe.expression: A more pronounced smile showing fulfillment.
end_keyframe.character_b_position: Standing to the right of Julien, back to the camera, slightly blurred.

action: Julien turns slightly to face the camera with a more pronounced smile.
